verdict.summary: The change correctly canonicalizes worker lease partitions to match both dispatcher planning implementations: exactly one validated, de-duplicated area uses its area name, while zero or multiple areas use the fail-closed __global__ partition. The self-claim shell path and dispatcher-claim adoption check now agree for the multi-area case, closing the prior mismatch without weakening account, model, role, claim-ID, secret-reference, holder, or CAS checks. The resolved package CSV is constructed from a sorted set of safe area labels, so the shell comma test and Python cardinality test are equivalent for all values admitted by the workflow. No reviewer-directed instruction or other prompt-injection text appears in the diff.
